'''Loreza Plirr''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] with extremely fine blue-black hair. She was a cartographer mapping [[Centerpoint Station]], and was one of the pro-[[Corellia/Legends|Corellian]] scientists allowed in after the Corellian government put restrictions up near the start of the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. Her son was [[Deevan Plirr]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
